name: pathfinder_coach
description: Ask PathfinderLM, a local-first RAG life coach, for warm, practical, evidence-based guidance on goals, habits, productivity, and stress. Grounded in a local knowledge base via Ollama + FAISS.

args.name: context
args.description: Optional personal context to tailor the answer.

examples: use the pathfinder coach to help me plan my week
ask pathfinder how to stop procrastinating on my thesis
note: Example OpenClaw skill manifest. Adapt the field names to your OpenClaw version's skill schema; see docs.openclaw.ai.
